title: We Never Know We Go, -- When We Are Going"
content:
We never know we go, -- when we are going
    We jest and shut the door;
    Fate following behind us bolts it,
    And we accost no more.
meaning:
"We Never Know We Go, -- When We Are Going"" is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
